segments: I want no sustenance from them nor do I want them to feed Me.
en.ahmedali.text: I want no sustenance from them nor do I want them to feed Me.

segments: I do not ask any sustenance from them, nor wish that they give Me food.
en.ahmedraza.text: I do not ask any sustenance from them, nor wish that they give Me food.

segments: I desire of them no provision, neither do I desire that they should feed Me.
en.arberry.text: I desire of them no provision, neither do I desire that they should feed Me.

segments: I seek not any provision from them, nor I desire that they should feed Me.
en.daryabadi.text: I seek not any provision from them, nor I desire that they should feed Me.

segments: I seek not any provision from them (i.e. provision for themselves or for My creatures) nor do I ask that they should feed Me (i.e. feed themselves or My creatures).
en.hilali.text: I seek not any provision from them (i.e. provision for themselves or for My creatures) nor do I ask that they should feed Me (i.e. feed themselves or My creatures).

segments: I need no livelihood from them, nor do I need them to feed Me.
en.itani.text: I need no livelihood from them, nor do I need them to feed Me.

segments: I desire from them no provision, nor do I want them to feed Me.
en.maududi.text: I desire from them no provision, nor do I want them to feed Me.

segments: I seek not any provision from them nor do I ask that they should feed Me.
en.mubarakpuri.text: I seek not any provision from them nor do I ask that they should feed Me.

segments: I seek no livelihood from them, nor do I ask that they should feed Me.
en.pickthall.text: I seek no livelihood from them, nor do I ask that they should feed Me.

segments: I desire no provision from them, nor do I desire that they should feed Me.
en.qarai.text: I desire no provision from them, nor do I desire that they should feed Me.

segments: I do not desire provision from them, nor do I desire that they should feed Me.
en.qaribullah.text: I do not desire provision from them, nor do I desire that they should feed Me.

segments: I do not want from them any provision, nor do I want them to feed Me.
en.sahih.text: I do not want from them any provision, nor do I want them to feed Me.

segments: I do not expect to receive any sustenance from them or that they should feed Me.
en.sarwar.text: I do not expect to receive any sustenance from them or that they should feed Me.

segments: I do not desire from them any sustenance and I do not desire that they should feed Me.
en.shakir.text: I do not desire from them any sustenance and I do not desire that they should feed Me.

segments: Ma oreedu minhum min rizqin wama oreedu an yutAAimooni
en.transliteration.text: Ma oreedu minhum min rizqin wama oreedu an yutAAimooni

segments: I seek no sustenance from them, nor do I want them to feed Me --
en.wahiduddin.text: I seek no sustenance from them, nor do I want them to feed Me --

segments: No Sustenance do I require of them, nor do I require that they should feed Me.
en.yusufali.text: No Sustenance do I require of them, nor do I require that they should feed Me.

segments: از آنان هیچ رزقی نمی خواهم، و نمی خواهم که مرا طعام دهند.
fa.ansarian.text: از آنان هیچ رزقی نمی خواهم، و نمی خواهم که مرا طعام دهند.

segments: از آنها رزقى نمى‌خواهم و نمى‌خواهم كه مرا اطعام كنند.
fa.ayati.text: از آنها رزقى نمى‌خواهم و نمى‌خواهم كه مرا اطعام كنند.

segments: از آنان هيچ روزيى نمى‌خواهم، و نمى‌خواهم كه مرا اطعام كنند
fa.bahrampour.text: از آنان هيچ روزيى نمى‌خواهم، و نمى‌خواهم كه مرا اطعام كنند

segments: از آنان هيچ روزيى نمى‌خواهم، و نمى‌خواهم كه مرا خوراك دهند.
fa.fooladvand.text: از آنان هيچ روزيى نمى‌خواهم، و نمى‌خواهم كه مرا خوراك دهند.

segments: من از (خلق) آنها رزق و طعام (و هیچ گونه سودی) بر خود نخواستم.
fa.ghomshei.text: من از (خلق) آنها رزق و طعام (و هیچ گونه سودی) بر خود نخواستم.

segments: من از آنان نه درخواست هیچ گونه رزق و روزی می‌کنم، و نه می‌خواهم که مرا خوراک دهند. [[«مَآ أُرِیدُ مِنْهُمْ ...»: من بی‌نیاز از جهانیانم و روزی‌ده ایشانم؛ نه روزیخوار آنان.]]
fa.khorramdel.text: من از آنان نه درخواست هیچ گونه رزق و روزی می‌کنم، و نه می‌خواهم که مرا خوراک دهند. [[«مَآ أُرِیدُ مِنْهُمْ ...»: من بی‌نیاز از جهانیانم و روزی‌ده ایشانم؛ نه روزیخوار آنان.]]

segments: از آنان رزقی نخواسته‌ام و نخواسته‌ام که به من خوراک دهند
fa.khorramshahi.text: از آنان رزقی نخواسته‌ام و نخواسته‌ام که به من خوراک دهند

segments: هرگز از آنها روزی نمی‌خواهم، و نمی‌خواهم مرا اطعام کنند!
fa.makarem.text: هرگز از آنها روزی نمی‌خواهم، و نمی‌خواهم مرا اطعام کنند!

segments: نخواهم از آنان روزیی و نخواهم که مرا خورانند
fa.moezzi.text: نخواهم از آنان روزیی و نخواهم که مرا خورانند

segments: از آنان روزيى نمى‌خواهم و نمى‌خواهم كه مرا طعام دهند
fa.mojtabavi.text: از آنان روزيى نمى‌خواهم و نمى‌خواهم كه مرا طعام دهند

segments: از آنان هیچ روزی نمی‌خواهم و نمی‌خواهم که مرا خوراک دهند.
fa.sadeqi.text: از آنان هیچ روزی نمی‌خواهم و نمی‌خواهم که مرا خوراک دهند.

segments: إِنَ‌ اللَّهَ‌ هُوَ الرَّزَّاقُ‌ ذُو الْقُوَّةِ الْمَتِينُ‌
arabic.text: إِنَ‌ اللَّهَ‌ هُوَ الرَّزَّاقُ‌ ذُو الْقُوَّةِ الْمَتِينُ‌

segments: God is certainly the great provider, Lord of strength and power.
en.ahmedali.text: God is certainly the great provider, Lord of strength and power.

segments: Indeed it is Allah, Who is the Greatest Sustainer, the Strong, the Able.
en.ahmedraza.text: Indeed it is Allah, Who is the Greatest Sustainer, the Strong, the Able.

segments: Surely God is the All-provider, the Possessor of Strength, the Ever-Sure.
en.arberry.text: Surely God is the All-provider, the Possessor of Strength, the Ever-Sure.

segments: Verily Allah! He is the Provider, Owner of power, Firm.
en.daryabadi.text: Verily Allah! He is the Provider, Owner of power, Firm.

segments: Verily, Allah is the All-Provider, Owner of Power, the Most Strong.
en.hilali.text: Verily, Allah is the All-Provider, Owner of Power, the Most Strong.

segments: God is the Provider, the One with Power, the Strong.
en.itani.text: God is the Provider, the One with Power, the Strong.

segments: Surely Allah is the Bestower of all provision, the Lord of all power, the Strong.
en.maududi.text: Surely Allah is the Bestower of all provision, the Lord of all power, the Strong.

segments: Verily, Allah is the All-Provider, Owner of power, the Most Strong.
en.mubarakpuri.text: Verily, Allah is the All-Provider, Owner of power, the Most Strong.

segments: Lo! Allah! He it is that giveth livelihood, the Lord of unbreakable might.
en.pickthall.text: Lo! Allah! He it is that giveth livelihood, the Lord of unbreakable might.

segments: Indeed it is Allah who is the All-provider, Powerful and All-strong.
en.qarai.text: Indeed it is Allah who is the All-provider, Powerful and All-strong.

segments: Surely, Allah is the Provider, the Possessor of Power, the Mighty.
en.qaribullah.text: Surely, Allah is the Provider, the Possessor of Power, the Mighty.

segments: Indeed, it is Allah who is the [continual] Provider, the firm possessor of strength.
en.sahih.text: Indeed, it is Allah who is the [continual] Provider, the firm possessor of strength.

segments: It is God Who is the Sustainer and the Lord of invincible strength.
en.sarwar.text: It is God Who is the Sustainer and the Lord of invincible strength.

segments: Surely Allah is the Bestower of sustenance, the Lord of Power, the Strong.
en.shakir.text: Surely Allah is the Bestower of sustenance, the Lord of Power, the Strong.

segments: Inna Allaha huwa alrrazzaqu thoo alquwwati almateenu
en.transliteration.text: Inna Allaha huwa alrrazzaqu thoo alquwwati almateenu

segments: it is God who is the great Sustainer, the Mighty One, the Invincible.
en.wahiduddin.text: it is God who is the great Sustainer, the Mighty One, the Invincible.

segments: For Allah is He Who gives (all) Sustenance,- Lord of Power,- Steadfast (for ever).
en.yusufali.text: For Allah is He Who gives (all) Sustenance,- Lord of Power,- Steadfast (for ever).

segments: بی تردید خدا خود روزی دهنده و صاحب قدرت استوار است.
fa.ansarian.text: بی تردید خدا خود روزی دهنده و صاحب قدرت استوار است.

segments: خداست روزى‌دهنده. و اوست صاحب نيرويى سخت استوار.
fa.ayati.text: خداست روزى‌دهنده. و اوست صاحب نيرويى سخت استوار.

segments: همانا خداوند، خود روزى‌رسان و صاحب قدرت و توانمند است
fa.bahrampour.text: همانا خداوند، خود روزى‌رسان و صاحب قدرت و توانمند است

segments: خداست كه خود روزى بخش نيرومند استوار است.
fa.fooladvand.text: خداست كه خود روزى بخش نيرومند استوار است.

segments: همانا روزی بخشنده خلق تنها خداست که صاحب قوّت و قدرت ابدی است.
fa.ghomshei.text: همانا روزی بخشنده خلق تنها خداست که صاحب قوّت و قدرت ابدی است.

segments: تنها خدا روزی‌رسان و صاحب قدرت و نیرومند است و بس. [[«ذُوالْقُوَّةِ»: دارای نیرو. «الْمَتِینُ»: دارای نیروی فراوان. تأکید (ذُوالْقُوَّةِ) است.]]
fa.khorramdel.text: تنها خدا روزی‌رسان و صاحب قدرت و نیرومند است و بس. [[«ذُوالْقُوَّةِ»: دارای نیرو. «الْمَتِینُ»: دارای نیروی فراوان. تأکید (ذُوالْقُوَّةِ) است.]]

segments: بی‌گمان خداوند است که روزی‌بخش نیرومند استوار است‌
fa.khorramshahi.text: بی‌گمان خداوند است که روزی‌بخش نیرومند استوار است‌

segments: خداوند روزی‌دهنده و صاحب قوّت و قدرت است!
fa.makarem.text: خداوند روزی‌دهنده و صاحب قوّت و قدرت است!

segments: همانا خدا است روزی‌دهنده توانای نیرومند
fa.moezzi.text: همانا خدا است روزی‌دهنده توانای نیرومند

segments: زيرا خداست روزى‌دهنده و با نيرو و توانمند.
fa.mojtabavi.text: زيرا خداست روزى‌دهنده و با نيرو و توانمند.

segments: همواره خداست که خود بسی روزی‌دهنده‌ی نیرومند استوار است.
fa.sadeqi.text: همواره خداست که خود بسی روزی‌دهنده‌ی نیرومند استوار است.

segments: فَإِنَ‌ لِلَّذِينَ‌ ظَلَمُوا ذَنُوباً مِثْلَ‌ ذَنُوبِ‌ أَصْحَابِهِمْ‌ فَلاَ يَسْتَعْجِلُونِ‌
arabic.text: فَإِنَ‌ لِلَّذِينَ‌ ظَلَمُوا ذَنُوباً مِثْلَ‌ ذَنُوبِ‌ أَصْحَابِهِمْ‌ فَلاَ يَسْتَعْجِلُونِ‌

segments: Those who do wrong will indeed come to the same end as their fellows (of old). So let them not ask Me to hasten (the punishment).
en.ahmedali.text: Those who do wrong will indeed come to the same end as their fellows (of old). So let them not ask Me to hasten (the punishment).

segments: And indeed for these unjust is also a turn of punishment, like that of their companions – so they must not ask Me to hasten.
en.ahmedraza.text: And indeed for these unjust is also a turn of punishment, like that of their companions – so they must not ask Me to hasten.

segments: The evildoers shall have their portion, like the portion of their fellows; so let them not hasten Me!
en.arberry.text: The evildoers shall have their portion, like the portion of their fellows; so let them not hasten Me!

segments: So verily Unto those who do wrong there is a portion like Unto the portion of their fellows; wherefore let them not ask Me to hasten on.
en.daryabadi.text: So verily Unto those who do wrong there is a portion like Unto the portion of their fellows; wherefore let them not ask Me to hasten on.

segments: And verily, for those who do wrong, there is a portion of torment like to the evil portion of torment (which came for) their likes (of old), so let them not ask Me to hasten on!
en.hilali.text: And verily, for those who do wrong, there is a portion of torment like to the evil portion of torment (which came for) their likes (of old), so let them not ask Me to hasten on!

segments: Those who do wrong will have their turn, like the turn of their counterparts, so let them not rush Me.
en.itani.text: Those who do wrong will have their turn, like the turn of their counterparts, so let them not rush Me.

segments: The wrong-doers shall receive a portion of the chastisements as their fellows (of yore). So let them not rush Me.
en.maududi.text: The wrong-doers shall receive a portion of the chastisements as their fellows (of yore). So let them not rush Me.

segments: And verily, for those who do wrong, there is a portion of torment like to the evil portion of torment (which came for) their likes (of old); so let them not ask Me to hasten on!
en.mubarakpuri.text: And verily, for those who do wrong, there is a portion of torment like to the evil portion of torment (which came for) their likes (of old); so let them not ask Me to hasten on!

segments: And lo! for those who (now) do wrong there is an evil day like unto the evil day (which came for) their likes (of old); so let them not ask Me to hasten on (that day).
en.pickthall.text: And lo! for those who (now) do wrong there is an evil day like unto the evil day (which came for) their likes (of old); so let them not ask Me to hasten on (that day).

segments: Indeed the lot of those who do wrong [now] will be like the lot of their [earlier] counterparts. So let them not ask Me to hasten on [that fate].
en.qarai.text: Indeed the lot of those who do wrong [now] will be like the lot of their [earlier] counterparts. So let them not ask Me to hasten on [that fate].

segments: The evildoers shall have for their portion, a portion like their companions (who were destroyed before them). Therefore, they should not ask Us to hasten!
en.qaribullah.text: The evildoers shall have for their portion, a portion like their companions (who were destroyed before them). Therefore, they should not ask Us to hasten!

segments: And indeed, for those who have wronged is a portion [of punishment] like the portion of their predecessors, so let them not impatiently urge Me.
en.sahih.text: And indeed, for those who have wronged is a portion [of punishment] like the portion of their predecessors, so let them not impatiently urge Me.

segments: The unjust will bear a burden like that of their unjust predecessors. Let them not make Me bring immediate punishment upon them.
en.sarwar.text: The unjust will bear a burden like that of their unjust predecessors. Let them not make Me bring immediate punishment upon them.

segments: So surely those who are unjust shall have a portion like the portion of their companions, therefore let them not ask Me to hasten on.
en.shakir.text: So surely those who are unjust shall have a portion like the portion of their companions, therefore let them not ask Me to hasten on.

segments: Fainna lillatheena thalamoo thanooban mithla thanoobi ashabihim fala yastaAAjiloona
en.transliteration.text: Fainna lillatheena thalamoo thanooban mithla thanoobi ashabihim fala yastaAAjiloona

segments: The wrongdoers will meet the same fate as their predecessors, let them not ask Me to hasten on [the punishment],
en.wahiduddin.text: The wrongdoers will meet the same fate as their predecessors, let them not ask Me to hasten on [the punishment],

segments: For the Wrong-doers, their portion is like unto the portion of their fellows (of earlier generations): then let them not ask Me to hasten (that portion)!
en.yusufali.text: For the Wrong-doers, their portion is like unto the portion of their fellows (of earlier generations): then let them not ask Me to hasten (that portion)!

segments: پس برای کسانی [از قوم تو] که ستم ورزیدند، سهمی از عذاب است مانند سهم هم مسلکانشان [از امت های پیشین]، بنابراین شتاب در آمدن آن را نخواهند.
fa.ansarian.text: پس برای کسانی [از قوم تو] که ستم ورزیدند، سهمی از عذاب است مانند سهم هم مسلکانشان [از امت های پیشین]، بنابراین شتاب در آمدن آن را نخواهند.

segments: اين ستمكاران را از عذاب بهره‌اى است همانند بهره‌اى كه يارانشان داشتند. پس به شتاب چيزى از من نخواهند.
fa.ayati.text: اين ستمكاران را از عذاب بهره‌اى است همانند بهره‌اى كه يارانشان داشتند. پس به شتاب چيزى از من نخواهند.

segments: پس براى كسانى كه ستم كردند، سهم بزرگى از عذاب است همانند سهم يارانشان [از ستمگران گذشته‌]، بنابر اين عجله نكنند
fa.bahrampour.text: پس براى كسانى كه ستم كردند، سهم بزرگى از عذاب است همانند سهم يارانشان [از ستمگران گذشته‌]، بنابر اين عجله نكنند

segments: پس براى كسانى كه ستم كردند بهره‌اى است از عذاب، همانند بهره عذاب ياران [قبلى‌]شان. پس [بگو:] در خواستن عذاب از من، شتابزدگى نكنند.
fa.fooladvand.text: پس براى كسانى كه ستم كردند بهره‌اى است از عذاب، همانند بهره عذاب ياران [قبلى‌]شان. پس [بگو:] در خواستن عذاب از من، شتابزدگى نكنند.

segments: پس این ستمکاران را هم گناهی و کیفری مانند اصحاب و امثالشان (از امم پیشین) خواهد بود، باری آن را به عجله از من نخواهند (و به مهلتی که دادیم مغرور نشوند البتّه روز انتقامشان می‌رسد).
fa.ghomshei.text: پس این ستمکاران را هم گناهی و کیفری مانند اصحاب و امثالشان (از امم پیشین) خواهد بود، باری آن را به عجله از من نخواهند (و به مهلتی که دادیم مغرور نشوند البتّه روز انتقامشان می‌رسد).

segments: کسانی که ستم می‌کنند، سهم بزرگی از عذاب دارند، همانند سهم بزرگ یارانشان (از اقوام ستمگر پیشین!). بنابراین، از من به شتاب وقوع عذاب را مخواهید. [[«ذَنُوباً»: سطل بزرگ، دلوهای بزرگی که دنباله دارند. «فَلا یَسْتَعْجِلُونِ»: (نگا: انبیاء / 37).]]
fa.khorramdel.text: کسانی که ستم می‌کنند، سهم بزرگی از عذاب دارند، همانند سهم بزرگ یارانشان (از اقوام ستمگر پیشین!). بنابراین، از من به شتاب وقوع عذاب را مخواهید. [[«ذَنُوباً»: سطل بزرگ، دلوهای بزرگی که دنباله دارند. «فَلا یَسْتَعْجِلُونِ»: (نگا: انبیاء / 37).]]

segments: آری برای [این‌] ستمکاران هم نصیبی [از عذاب‌] همانند نصیب یارانشان است، نباید که به شتابش از من بطلبند
fa.khorramshahi.text: آری برای [این‌] ستمکاران هم نصیبی [از عذاب‌] همانند نصیب یارانشان است، نباید که به شتابش از من بطلبند

segments: و برای کسانی که ستم کردند، سهم بزرگی از عذاب است همانند سهم یارانشان (از اقوام ستمگر پیشین)؛ بنابر این عجله نکنند!
fa.makarem.text: و برای کسانی که ستم کردند، سهم بزرگی از عذاب است همانند سهم یارانشان (از اقوام ستمگر پیشین)؛ بنابر این عجله نکنند!

segments: هرآینه آنان را که ستم کردند بهره‌ای است مانند بهره یارانشان پس شتاب نجویند از من‌
fa.moezzi.text: هرآینه آنان را که ستم کردند بهره‌ای است مانند بهره یارانشان پس شتاب نجویند از من‌

segments: همانا كسانى را كه [با كفر ورزيدن به خود] ستم كردند بهره‌اى است از عذاب همانند بهره ياران [گذشته‌] آنها. پس [آن را] به شتاب از من نخواهند.
fa.mojtabavi.text: همانا كسانى را كه [با كفر ورزيدن به خود] ستم كردند بهره‌اى است از عذاب همانند بهره ياران [گذشته‌] آنها. پس [آن را] به شتاب از من نخواهند.

segments: پس بی‌گمان برای کسانی که ستم کردند پیامدی بد است؛ همانند پیامد بد یارانشان. پس در خواستن عذاب از من شتاب نجویند.
fa.sadeqi.text: پس بی‌گمان برای کسانی که ستم کردند پیامدی بد است؛ همانند پیامد بد یارانشان. پس در خواستن عذاب از من شتاب نجویند.

segments: فَوَيْلٌ‌ لِلَّذِينَ‌ کَفَرُوا مِنْ‌ يَوْمِهِمُ‌ الَّذِي‌ يُوعَدُونَ‌
arabic.text: فَوَيْلٌ‌ لِلَّذِينَ‌ کَفَرُوا مِنْ‌ يَوْمِهِمُ‌ الَّذِي‌ يُوعَدُونَ‌

segments: Alas the woe for those who refuse to believe in the Day which has been promised them.
en.ahmedali.text: Alas the woe for those who refuse to believe in the Day which has been promised them.

segments: So ruin is for disbelievers, from their day – which they are promised.
en.ahmedraza.text: So ruin is for disbelievers, from their day – which they are promised.

segments: So woe to the unbelievers, for that day of theirs that they are promised.
en.arberry.text: So woe to the unbelievers, for that day of theirs that they are promised.

segments: Woe, then, Unto those who disbelieve in their Day which they are promised.
en.daryabadi.text: Woe, then, Unto those who disbelieve in their Day which they are promised.

segments: Then, woe to those who disbelieve (in Allah and His Oneness Islamic Monotheism) from (that) their Day which they have been promised (for their punishment).
en.hilali.text: Then, woe to those who disbelieve (in Allah and His Oneness Islamic Monotheism) from (that) their Day which they have been promised (for their punishment).

segments: So woe to those who disbelieve because of that Day of theirs which they are promised.
en.itani.text: So woe to those who disbelieve because of that Day of theirs which they are promised.

segments: Woe, then, betide those who disbelieved in that Day of theirs which they are being asked to hold in dread.
en.maududi.text: Woe, then, betide those who disbelieved in that Day of theirs which they are being asked to hold in dread.

segments: Then woe to those who disbelieve from their Day which they have been promised.
en.mubarakpuri.text: Then woe to those who disbelieve from their Day which they have been promised.

segments: And woe unto those who disbelieve, from (that) their day which they are promised.
en.pickthall.text: And woe unto those who disbelieve, from (that) their day which they are promised.

segments: Woe to the faithless for the day they are promised!
en.qarai.text: Woe to the faithless for the day they are promised!

segments: Woe then to the unbelievers for their Day which they were promised!
en.qaribullah.text: Woe then to the unbelievers for their Day which they were promised!

segments: And woe to those who have disbelieved from their Day which they are promised.
en.sahih.text: And woe to those who have disbelieved from their Day which they are promised.

segments: Woe to the disbelievers when the day with which they have been threatened comes!
en.sarwar.text: Woe to the disbelievers when the day with which they have been threatened comes!

segments: Therefore woe to those who disbelieve because of their day which they are threatened with.
en.shakir.text: Therefore woe to those who disbelieve because of their day which they are threatened with.

segments: Fawaylun lillatheena kafaroo min yawmihimu allathee yooAAadoona
en.transliteration.text: Fawaylun lillatheena kafaroo min yawmihimu allathee yooAAadoona

segments: woe, then, to those who are bent on denying the truth, when the Day arrives which they have been promised.
en.wahiduddin.text: woe, then, to those who are bent on denying the truth, when the Day arrives which they have been promised.

segments: Woe, then, to the Unbelievers, on account of that Day of theirs which they have been promised!
en.yusufali.text: Woe, then, to the Unbelievers, on account of that Day of theirs which they have been promised!

segments: پس وای بر کسانی که کافر شدند از آن روزشان که به آن وعده داده می شوند.
fa.ansarian.text: پس وای بر کسانی که کافر شدند از آن روزشان که به آن وعده داده می شوند.

segments: واى بر كافران، از آن روز كه آنها را وعده داده‌اند.
fa.ayati.text: واى بر كافران، از آن روز كه آنها را وعده داده‌اند.

segments: پس واى بر كسانى كه كافر شدند از آن روزشان كه وعده داده مى‌شوند
fa.bahrampour.text: پس واى بر كسانى كه كافر شدند از آن روزشان كه وعده داده مى‌شوند

segments: پس واى بر كسانى كه كافر شده‌اند از آن روزى كه وعده يافته‌اند.
fa.fooladvand.text: پس واى بر كسانى كه كافر شده‌اند از آن روزى كه وعده يافته‌اند.

segments: پس (آن گاه که زمان کیفر فرا رسید) وای بر آنان که کافر شدند از آن روز سختی که (رسولان) به آنها وعده می‌دهند (که در دنیا به قتل و اسارت و در عقبی به قهر و عقوبت محکومند).
fa.ghomshei.text: پس (آن گاه که زمان کیفر فرا رسید) وای بر آنان که کافر شدند از آن روز سختی که (رسولان) به آنها وعده می‌دهند (که در دنیا به قتل و اسارت و در عقبی به قهر و عقوبت محکومند).

segments: واویلا بر کافران! از دست آن روزی که ایشان بدان وعده داده می‌شوند. [[«فَوَیْلٌ لِلَّذِینَ ...»: (نگا: ابراهیم / 2، مریم / 37، ص / 27، زخرف / 65).]]
fa.khorramdel.text: واویلا بر کافران! از دست آن روزی که ایشان بدان وعده داده می‌شوند. [[«فَوَیْلٌ لِلَّذِینَ ...»: (نگا: ابراهیم / 2، مریم / 37، ص / 27، زخرف / 65).]]

segments: پس وای بر کافران از آن روزشان که وعده‌اش را به ایشان داده‌اند
fa.khorramshahi.text: پس وای بر کافران از آن روزشان که وعده‌اش را به ایشان داده‌اند

segments: پس وای بر کسانی که کافر شدند از روزی که به آنها وعده داده می‌شود!
fa.makarem.text: پس وای بر کسانی که کافر شدند از روزی که به آنها وعده داده می‌شود!

segments: پس وای از برای آنان که کفر ورزیدند از روز ایشان که وعده داده شوند
fa.moezzi.text: پس وای از برای آنان که کفر ورزیدند از روز ایشان که وعده داده شوند

segments: پس واى بر كافران از آن روزشان كه وعده داده مى‌شوند- روز رستاخيز-.
fa.mojtabavi.text: پس واى بر كافران از آن روزشان كه وعده داده مى‌شوند- روز رستاخيز-.

segments: پس وای برای کسانی که کافر شدند از آن روزشان که وعده داده می‌شوند.
fa.sadeqi.text: پس وای برای کسانی که کافر شدند از آن روزشان که وعده داده می‌شوند.
